description: Auto-emit one Dagster asset per Facebook Ads campaign across specified ad accounts. StateBackedComponent — discovery cached to disk. Materializing an asset runs an insights query and emits a DataFrame with impressions / clicks / spend / reach / ctr / cpc metrics.

access_token_env_var.label: Access Token Env Var
access_token_env_var.description: Env var with a Facebook Marketing API access token (ads_read scope).

account_ids.label: Ad Account IDs
account_ids.description: Facebook ad account IDs (with or without act_ prefix).

insights_fields.label: Insights Fields
insights_fields.description: Facebook Marketing API insights fields to fetch.
